content.full_text:
November 8, 1990

John Larson
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Larson,

On the back of Form 635, pertaining to the Report of Lobbyist Employer, there is a statement that the report must be verified and signed by the filer.

Question: What is the definition of "filer" and, if it includes "a responsible officer", what is the definition of "responsible officer".

Sincerely,

Dal Bural

DB:gr
